message:
test: fix path traversal test and improve list output assertions

- sync.rs: use temp.path().join() for traversal path so the test
  validates against an absolute path rooted in the temp dir, matching
  real-world behavior.

- e2e_list_scenarios.rs: assert against the actual issue ID returned
  by setup_diverse_workspace instead of a loose prefix match, and add
  debug output for easier diagnosis on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
